programmes.show_description: An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Christmas romance with Cindy Sampson. To save her school from closure, a principal asks a Hollywood star - and former flame - to direct the school play. Will it set the stage for love? (2020)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Romantic comedy starring Krysta Rodriguez. A professor and a lounge singer's chance encounter sparks unexpected chemistry, all unbeknownst to them, orchestrated by their matchmaking mothers. (2022)
An uplifting round-up of good news stories from the UK and around the world.
Single mum Diane is in for a few fur-prises when she inherits a house - and its resident hound - in her hometown. But will a fresh start in the dog's house unleash the paw-fect romance? (2017)
